description: Style NoteMinimalist styling peppered with innovative design details, we love wearable timepieces by QnQ! Styled to perfection, this watch is the perfect accessory staple you've been looking for. Liven up the summer with this watch from QnQ!  Product DetailsCase style:  Stainless steel round case Dial style: Blue dial with metallic and white hands and branding displayed on the dialStrap style: Black plastic strap with a tang claspFeatures: Date aperture on the dial and screw to reset time  Waterproof to 10 BAR, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfingWarranty: 1 year SizeCase diameter: 42 mm Case thickness: 10 mm
